blogArticles.headline: Selecting Risk Controls and Accepting Residual Risk
blogArticles.blurb: Where Safety Risk Management moves from analysis to action — how organizations develop controls under §5.55(c)–(d).

blogArticles.headline: The Evolution of Aviation SMS
blogArticles.blurb: From the Wright brothers to the 2024 FAA rule — how aviation safety evolved from reactive investigation to proactive risk management.

blogArticles.headline: Safety Culture in Aviation SMS
blogArticles.blurb: How organizational culture shapes safety outcomes and what it takes to build a reporting culture that supports SMS.

blogArticles.headline: SMS Declaration of Compliance
blogArticles.blurb: What the SMS Declaration of Compliance means for operators and what the FAA expects.

blogArticles.headline: How to Assess Safety Risk
blogArticles.blurb: A practical walkthrough of safety risk assessment under 14 CFR Part 5.

videos.headline: FAA Aviation Safety at Oshkosh
videos.blurb: Go behind the scenes at EAA AirVenture with the FAA's Aviation Safety organization. Meet the people who help ensure safety at this event and provide essential information resources to the general aviation community.

videos.headline: FAA Part 5 SMS for Small Operators: Safety Assurance
videos.blurb: This video covers the safety management system (SMS) component safety assurance, which  evaluates the continued effectiveness of implemented risk control strategies and supports the identification of new hazards. Whether you're an owner, operator or part of a small aviation team, this guide provides valuable insights and tools to enhance your safety management practices and ensure a safer operational environment.

videos.headline: FAA Part 5 SMS for Small Operators: Safety Policy & Safety Promotion
videos.blurb: This video provides an overview of implementing a safety management system (SMS), specifically aligned with FAA Part 5 regulations. Join us as we explore Blue Skies Charter, a fictional company, and learn about general SMS requirements, safety policy development and safety promotion strategies. This video covers essential components like leadership commitment, gap analysis, safety objectives, emergency response planning and employee training. Whether you're a small charter operator or interested in aviation safety, this video offers valuable insights into building an effective SMS.

videos.headline: FAA Part 5 SMS for Small Operators: Safety Risk Management
videos.blurb: This video covers the safety management system (SMS) component safety risk management, which determines the need for, and adequacy of, new or revised risk controls based on the assessment of acceptable risk.

curatedArticles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
curatedArticles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
